title: Dealix Agent Output Contract
description: Every output produced by a Dealix agent or worker must comply with this contract before it can be used externally.

summary.description: One-paragraph human summary of what this output asserts or proposes.

evidence.description: Concrete references, sources, or artifacts that support the summary. Required.

approval_class.description: A0 internal-no-approval, A1 reviewer-sign-off, A2 founder-approval-required, A3 must-not-automate.
